title: No UI on Tab
description: A simple Quilt Mod to hide UI elements when showing the Player list.
body:
[![Supports Quilt](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/supported/quilt_vector.svg&h=48)](https://quiltmc.org)  
[![Supports Quilt](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/supported/fabric_vector.svg&h=48)](https://fabricmc.net)

*No UI on Tab* is a simple Mod for Quilt that hides UI elements such as the hotbar, chat, scoreboard, etc. whenever you view the tab list.

## Why?
The tab list can - and often times will - overlap with different elements of your UI such as chat messages, scoreboards, the bossbar, etc.
This makes it harder to actually see the tab list, and especially who is on it.

## What elements are currently hidden?

- Overlay (Honestly no clue what is meant with that... The vignette?)
- Crosshair
- Hotbar
- Experience levels
- Status Effect Overlays
- Bossbar
- Demo Timer
- Debug Screen
- Scoreboard
- Overlay Message (Again, no clue what that should be...)
- Titles
- Chat

## Future Plans

- Add configuration options to set what UI elements should be hidden? Would make the current implementation a lot more difficult, so it's not really a plan for the future.
